ReactScanDemo.title: React Scan Performance Demo
ReactScanDemo.description: Interactive demonstration of React Scan performance monitoring capabilities

instructions.title: How to Use This Demo
instructions.step1: Press Ctrl+Shift+X to toggle React Scan on/off
instructions.step2: Click the buttons below to trigger different types of renders
instructions.step3: Watch for red highlights (unnecessary renders) and green highlights (optimized renders)
instructions.step4: Use the React Scan toolbar in the bottom-right corner for detailed analysis

meta.title: PVC Conduit Bending Machines | Tianze
meta.description: Self-developed full-auto and semi-auto PVC conduit bending machines. The core manufacturing technology behind our fittings.

hero.title: PVC Conduit Bending Machines
hero.subtitle: Self-developed. In-house manufactured. The technology behind our fittings.

card1.title: We Make the Machines
card1.desc: As an upstream bending machine manufacturer, we control the core technology that shapes every fitting.

card2.title: Precision Control
card2.desc: CNC-controlled bending ensures consistent angles, wall thickness, and finish across every production run.

card3.title: Custom Capability
card3.desc: In-house mold development means we can produce non-standard sizes, angles, and specifications to your requirements.

cta.heading: Interested in our bending technology?
cta.description: Whether you need OEM manufacturing or want to discuss custom specifications, we're ready to help.

meta.title: OEM & Custom Manufacturing | Tianze
meta.description: Custom PVC conduit fittings manufacturing — your specifications, our production capability. From prototype to mass production.

customSizes.title: Custom Sizes
customSizes.desc: Non-standard diameters, angles, and wall thicknesses to your exact specifications.

privateLabel.title: Private Label
privateLabel.desc: Your brand, your packaging. Complete branded product solutions.

moldDevelopment.title: Mold Development
moldDevelopment.desc: In-house mold design and manufacturing for any fitting geometry.

qualityAssurance.title: Quality Assurance
qualityAssurance.desc: Full inspection with optional third-party certification to your required standards.

step2.title: Sample
step2.desc: We produce samples for your approval

step4.title: Trial Run
step4.desc: Small batch production for final validation

standards.title: Supported Standards
standards.desc: We manufacture to all major international conduit standards — and custom specifications.
